# Building blue

## Requirements

To build Blue, you need:

- Java Development Kit 25
  Provides the Java 25 toolchain that Blue is built and tested against.

- Apache Maven
  Blue is a Maven multi-module project. The repository includes the Maven
  Wrapper, so `./mvnw clean verify` is the recommended way to build and test
  from the command line.

- Apache NetBeans IDE (optional)
  NetBeans is useful for IDE-based development, but it is not required to
  build Blue. The Apache NetBeans project site is at
  <https://netbeans.apache.org/>.

## Getting the Sources

Blue's source code is maintained on GitHub at
<https://github.com/kunstmusik/blue>. You can download archives of the
source code or clone the Git repository from there.
